title: Piglin Brute Drops│豬布林蠻兵掉落物
description: Piglin Brute will drop Netherite Scrap when killed.│豬布林蠻兵被擊殺時會掉落下界合金碎片。
body:
# Function│功能
- Piglin Brute will drop 0-2 Netherite Scrap when killed, and each level of Looting enchantment on the weapon will increase the drop limit by 1.│豬布林蠻兵被擊殺後會掉落0-2個下界合金碎片，武器上的每一級掠奪附魔會使掉落數量的上限+1。
